Maxwell DealFlow CRM

Visual Guide — Every Screen & Email

A comprehensive tour of the Maxwell DealFlow real estate CRM platform. Built for agents to manage clients, track viewings and offers, monitor new builds, and close deals. This guide showcases every user-facing screen, client email template, and public-facing portal.

Agent: Maxwell Delali Midodzi · REALTOR® · eXp Realty · St. John's, NL

App Screens

Dashboard Overview. At-a-glance stats, quick actions, and recent activity feed. Maxwell sees all 8 active clients, pending viewings, and deal pipeline status.

All Clients. Browse active buyers and sellers with search, filter by stage (Searching/Viewings/Offers/Accepted/Closing/Closed), and manage the client database.

Viewings List. Schedule, track, and manage property viewings. Shows property address, scheduled date/time, MLS, price, and client feedback (interested/completed/upcoming).

Offers Tracker. Monitor all offers across statuses: Submitted (awaiting response), Accepted (going to closing), Pipeline (future), and Requests (from clients). See offer amounts vs list prices.

New Build Tracker. Monitor McCrowe Homes build progress for Zinabu Yakubu. Shows 45% completion, stage breakdown (Pre-Cons/Financing/Construction/Conditions/Possession), and countdown to possession.

Email Templates

Client-facing emails sent during the transaction journey.

Viewing Confirmation. Client receives property details, date/time, list price, MLS#, and a "Add to Calendar" button. Includes Google Calendar and .ics support.

Offer Accepted (Celebratory). Notifies client their offer was accepted, outlines next steps (conditions, lawyer, final walkthrough, keys), and reinforces timeline to closing.

Offer Submitted. Confirms client offer is officially with the seller's agent. Shows offer amount, list price, and expectation-setting ("I'll be in touch moment we hear back").

Build Progress Update (McCrowe Homes). Zinabu receives framing completion milestone, 45% progress, and next stages (roofing, electrical, drywall). Aug 30 possession countdown included.

Public Pages

Client-facing portals and response pages (no login required).

Viewing Response Portal. Client can respond to viewings without login. Options: Make Offer (with amount + note), Continue Searching, Not a Good Fit (with feedback). Self-contained, secure link.

Build Progress Portal (Client View). Zinabu tracks 16 Knightsbridge Ct build live. Shows stage breakdown, % complete, days to possession, and full milestone timeline. Auto-updates.

Maxwell DealFlow CRM — Visual Guide v2

Maxwell Delali Midodzi, REALTOR® | eXp Realty | (709) 325-0545
